name: PER_TASK_ACTIONS_VL
query: SELECT B.TASK_ACTION_ID, B.TASK_ACTION_CODE, T.TASK_ACTION_NAME, T.DESCRIPTION, B.TASK_TYPE, B.TASK_PERFORMER, B.TASKFLOW_ID, B.TASKFLOW_PARAMS, B.MODULE_ID, B.SEED_DATA_SOURCE, B.ENTERPRISE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.OBSOLETE_FLAG FROM PER_TASK_ACTIONS_B B, PER_TASK_ACTIONS_TL T WHERE B.TASK_ACTION_ID = T.TASK_ACTION_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
